title: Cant argue with facts EVA Q RELEASE ANNOUNCED IN TEASERS
display_title: Cant argue with facts EVA Q RELEASE ANNOUNCED IN TEASERS
wikitext:
[]: Can't argue with facts! EVA Q RELEASE ANNOUNCED IN TEASERS Post by sayakodaisuki » Fri Jan 06, 2012 12:52 am I can not believe my post about the OFFICIAL TENTATIVE RELEASE DATE was deleted!!! Cry about it all you want but these are the facts...after my crossed out pevious post. HA! [s]Why is there not a single post about the release date of EVA Q??? I won't lie to you, it kind of pisses me off in a juvenile, retarded way lol... Mind you, it's a tentative release date, but it was already announced in August 2011.....COME ON![/s] Okay so I did find a post and the screenshot is genuine . I saw the same trailer after having watched the 2nd in a special Television broadcast in Japan whilst deployed there ( RNC AKA Nishinippon Broadcasting ). It came right after and yes; IT IS OFFICIAL . A shame I didn't discover this forum mid 2011 or I would have registered and posted sooner. The teaser was great, yet waaay too short (about 10 secs) Great eyepatch on Asuka though..cool new plugsuit too...awesome battle....can't wait to see ALL of it! BEST START COUNTING DOWN!!! Ye non believers, you'll see hehehe

[]: Post by Ornette » Fri Jan 06, 2012 12:54 am http://forum.evageeks.org/post/516174/Evangelion-333-Dreams/#516174
